name: Elia Albarn Lagrange
description: De facto leader of the party. Dual relic blade fighter who leads from the front.

ability_slots.name: The Last Argument
ability_slots.description: Heavy melee strike with both blades. High single-target physical damage.

ability_slots.name: Blade Storm
ability_slots.description: Rapid multi-hit attack striking up to 3 enemies in melee range.

ability_slots.name: Defensive Stance
ability_slots.description: Enter a defensive posture. Reduces all incoming damage by 50% for 2 turns.

ability_slots.name: Shield Wall
ability_slots.description: Intercept attacks aimed at a chosen ally, absorbing damage for 1 turn.

ability_slots.name: Riposte
ability_slots.description: Counter-attack when struck in melee. Deals damage back to the attacker.

ability_slots.name: Severing Strike
ability_slots.description: A devastating blow that ignores all shields and wards. Severs Synthetic connections.
